principles.name: single_responsibility
principles.description: Each module/class/function should have one reason to change. If a function does parsing AND validation AND saving, split it.

principles.name: no_god_classes
principles.description: No class should handle more than one domain concept. If a class has 10+ methods spanning multiple concerns, decompose it.

principles.name: dependency_direction
principles.description: Dependencies should point inward — business logic should not depend on infrastructure. Use interfaces at boundaries.

principles.name: prefer_composition
principles.description: Prefer composition over inheritance. Inheritance creates tight coupling. Compose behaviour from small, focused components.
